testcase.name: test_home_200_and_h1

failure.message: AssertionError: h1 must contain 'Shop Vac Bag' assert None + where None = (']*>[^<]*Shop Vac Bag[^<]*', ' ', re.IGNORECASE) + where = re.search + and re.IGNORECASE = re.I

testcase.failure: tests/test_static_html.py:19: in test_home_200_and_h1 assert re.search(r"]*>[^<]*Shop Vac Bag[^<]*", html, re.I), "h1 must contain 'Shop Vac Bag'" E AssertionError: h1 must contain 'Shop Vac Bag' E assert None E + where None = (']*>[^<]*Shop Vac Bag[^<]*', ' ', re.IGNORECASE) E + where = re.search E + and re.IGNORECASE = re.I

testcase.name: test_home_shows_99

failure.message:
AssertionError: expected $99 visible on homepage near CTA assert '$99' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====
 Per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by
 react-helmet-async via src/components/PageHead.jsx — see each
 route in src/pages/. They are baked into the prerendered HTML
 by scripts/prerender.js. Keep this block lean; only stable
 site-wide defaults below. -->
 <meta name="keywords" content="shop vac bags, wet dry vac bags, shop vac filter, wet dry vacuum filter, reusable shop vac bag, reusable wet dry vac bag, shop vac alternative, wet dry vac bag alternative, shop vac filter replacement, shop vac filter alternative, shop-vac bags, ridgid shop vac bags, craftsman shop vac bags, stanley shop vac bags, dewalt shop vac bags, milwaukee wet dry vac bags, vacmaster bags, armor all shop vac bags, shop vac filter bag, 12 gallon shop vac bags, 14 gallon shop vac bags, 16 gallon shop vac bags, 18 gallon shop vac bags, 20 gallon shop vac bags, hepa ...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a10ecf9e1e2a9d52',t:'MTc4MjMzNjM4OA=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.failure:
tests/test_static_html.py:31: in test_home_shows_99 assert "$99" in html, "expected $99 visible on homepage near CTA" E AssertionError: expected $99 visible on homepage near CTA E assert '$99' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====

 react-helmet-async via src/components/PageHead.jsx — see each

 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

testcase.name: test_home_product_price_meta

failure.message:
AssertionError: missing product:price:amount meta with 99.00 assert None + where None = <function search at 0xfb016af4d440>('<meta\s+property=["\']product:price:amount["\']\s+content=["\']99\.00["\']', '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====
 Per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by
 react-helmet-async via src/components/PageHead.jsx — see each
 route in src/pages/. They are baked into the prerendered HTML

 site-wide defaults below. -->
 <meta name="keywords" content="shop vac bags, wet dry vac bags, shop vac filter, wet dry vacuum filter, reusable shop vac bag, reusable wet dry vac bag, shop vac alternative, wet dry vac bag alternative, shop vac filter replacement, shop vac filter alternative, shop-vac bags, ridgid shop vac bags, craftsman shop vac bags, stanley shop vac bags, dewalt shop vac bags, milwaukee wet dry vac bags, vacmaster bags, armor all shop vac bags, shop vac filter bag, 12 gallon shop vac bags, 14 gallon shop vac bags, 16 gallon shop vac bags, 18 gallon shop vac bags, 20 gallon shop vac bags, hepa ...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

testcase.name: test_home_jsonld_single_product

failure.message: AssertionError: expected exactly 1 Product JSON-LD entity, found 2 assert 2 == 1 + where 2 = len(['"@type": "Product"', '"@type": "Product"'])

testcase.failure: tests/test_static_html.py:53: in test_home_jsonld_single_product assert len(products) == 1, f"expected exactly 1 Product JSON-LD entity, found {len(products)}" E AssertionError: expected exactly 1 Product JSON-LD entity, found 2 E assert 2 == 1 E + where 2 = len(['"@type": "Product"', '"@type": "Product"'])

testcase.name: test_home_hero_ribbon_patent_pending

failure.message:
AssertionError: Hero ribbon must say PATENT PENDING assert 'PATENT PENDING' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====
 Per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by

 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

</html>

testcase.name: test_ads_noindex_meta

<html lang="en">

 },

testcase.name: test_ads_trust_strip_pills

failure.message:
AssertionError: missing trust pill phrase 'Made in the USA' on /ads assert 'made in the usa' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39ff14" />

 <!-- ===== primary seo =====
 per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by
 react-helmet-async via src/components/pagehead.jsx — see each
 route in src/pages/. they are baked into the prerendered html
 by scripts/prerender.js. keep this block lean; only stable

 session_recording: {
 recordcrossoriginiframes: true,
 captureperformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

</html>

 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39ff14" />

 per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by

<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====
 Per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by
 react-helmet-async via src/components/PageHead.jsx — see each
 route in src/pages/. They are baked into the prerendered HTML
 by scripts/prerender.js. Keep this block lean; only stable
 site-wide defaults below. -->
 <meta name="keywords" content="shop vac bags, wet dry vac bags, shop vac filter, wet dry vacuum filter, reusable shop vac bag, reusable wet dry vac bag, shop vac alternative, wet dry vac bag alternative, shop vac filter replacement, shop vac filter alternative, shop-vac bags, ridgid shop vac bags, craftsman shop vac bags, stanley shop vac bags, dewalt shop vac bags, milwaukee wet dry vac bags, vacmaster bags, armor all shop vac bags, shop vac filter bag, 12 gallon shop vac bags, 14 gallon shop vac bags, 16 gallon shop vac bags, 18 gallon shop vac bags, 20 gallon shop vac bags, hepa ...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

testcase.name: test_about_200_and_h1

failure.message:
AssertionError: missing about h1 'Built by a contractor.' assert 'Built by a contractor' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#39FF14" />

 <!-- ===== PRIMARY SEO =====
 Per-route <title>, description, and canonical are managed by
 react-helmet-async via src/components/PageHead.jsx — see each
 route in src/pages/. They are baked into the prerendered HTML
 by scripts/prerender.js. Keep this block lean; only stable
 site-wide defaults below. -->

 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>

</html>
'
